de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.configuration

Class ChoiceSelector.ChoiceEntry

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.configuration.ChoiceSelector.ChoiceEntry
  • Enclosing class:
    ChoiceSelector

    public static class ChoiceSelector.ChoiceEntry
extends Object
    Represents a choice with all its meta information.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private String choice
      The choice.
      private boolean incomplete
      Is incomplete?
      static String INCOMPLETE_TEXT
      Text shown to the user in case of incompletness.
      private String information
      An optionally information.

      Is unsound?
      static String UNSOUND_TEXT
      Text shown to the user in case of unsoundness.
